overview.description: The PIMCO Investment Grade Corporate Bond Index ETF (CORP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Corporate index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated investment-grade corporate bonds. CORP was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by PIMCO.
